reference: Hello Doctor, I have been experiencing pimple breakouts for about a year now. I had no problems prior to this. The pimples are on my cheeks and my forehead, occasionally around my chin and jaw. They are very large and have caused a considerable amount of scarring all over my face. I have tried using cleansers for oily skin and frequently use a face scrub and activated charcoal mask. Do you have any suggestions to stop the pimples from appearing and also to heal my scarring?
text: Hello, doctor. I have been experiencing pimple breakouts for about a year now. I had no prior to this. The pimples are on my cheeks and my forehead, occasionally around my chin and jaw. They are very large and have caused a considerable amount of scarring all over my face. I have tried cleansers for oily skin and frequently use a face scrub and activated charcoal mask. Do you have any suggestions to stop the pimples from appearing and also to heal my scarring?
